heading: RURAL PATHWAY EXCELLENCE PARTNERSHIP (R-PEP) PROGRAM
operative_text: The commissioner shall establish and administer the Rural Pathway Excellence Partnership (R-PEP) program to incentivize and support multidistrict, cross-sector, rural college and career pathway partnerships that expand opportunities for underserved students to succeed in school and life while promoting economic development in rural areas.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt: In this section, "program" means the Rural Pathway Excellence Partnership (R-PEP) program.

_note: Section (h) is repealed. Section (j) contains an expiration note at end of text ('For expiration of this section, see Subsection (j).'). Subsection (j) caps total grants at $5 million per school year and allows up to 15% for administration/technical assistance.
